segments.text: The Lord is my light and my salvation; whom shall I fear? The Lord is the stronghold of my life; of whom shall I be afraid?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: When evildoers assail me to eat up my flesh, my adversaries and foes, they shall stumble and fall.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Though an army encamp against me, my heart shall not fear; though war arise against me, yet I will be confident.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: One thing have I asked of the Lord, that will I seek after: that I may dwell in the house of the Lord all the days of my life, to gaze upon the beauty of the Lord and to inquire in his temple.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For he will hide me in his shelter in the day of trouble; he will conceal me under the cover of his tent; he will lift me high upon a rock.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: And now my head shall be lifted up above my enemies all around me, and I will offer in his tent sacrifices with shouts of joy; I will sing and make melody to the Lord.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Hear, O Lord, when I cry aloud; be gracious to me and answer me!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have said, 'Seek my face.' My heart says to you, 'Your face, Lord, do I seek.'
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: When…: or, My heart said unto thee, Let my face seek thy face, etc

segments.text: Hide not your face from me. Turn not your servant away in anger, O you who have been my help. Cast me not off; forsake me not, O God of my salvation!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For my father and my mother have forsaken me, but the Lord will take me in.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Teach me your way, O Lord, and lead me on a level path because of my enemies.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: a plain…: Heb. a way of plainness; mine…: Heb. those which observe me

segments.text: Give me not up to the will of my adversaries; for false witnesses have risen against me, and they breathe out violence.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I believe that I shall look upon the goodness of the Lord in the land of the living!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Wait for the Lord; be strong, and let your heart take courage; wait for the Lord!
segments.speaker: David
